findings.title: Slow-path backoff must not freeze rolling updates / spec changes
findings.note: Round 1: canary (bug reproduced). Round 2: FIXED in 9ce22679 (early return 0 on Generation/Revision mismatch); inverted to contract. Control TestVerifyPR409_F1_Control_LegitimateBackoffStillApplies stays green.

findings.title: wasInstanceReady bypass must be bounded, not permanent
findings.note: Round 1: canary (permanent bypass reproduced). Round 2: FIXED in 9ce22679 (hasRecentRestart bounds the bypass to the stability window); inverted to contract, also verifies the recent-restart bypass still works.

findings.title: ClearRestarting on deletion unblocks a new same-name instance
maxDelaySeconds=600 default + CEL rejects base>600 with max omitted
findings.note: Behavior change confirmed via envtest. Round 2: author documented it in failure-handling.md (25f61156).

liveNote: L2 uses isolated envtest (its own API server + the PR config/crd/bases). The shared sandbox cluster was intentionally NOT modified. envtest assets: setup-envtest use 1.31.0 --bin-dir ./bin.
